title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss concerns about the AI boom, including exploding token consumption costs, the fact that only 18% of tokens are spent on shipped products, and a potential circular investment problem in the sector. They also cover Anthropic's valuation surge past OpenAI and emerging applications like AI-powered trading.
